changes: — sync.py v3.83 + SECTION_11.md v11.15 — Per-sport zone preference (2026-03-14) —

New config: ZONE_PREFERENCE — override power/HR priority per sport (e.g. run:hr,cycling:power). Zone aggregations (TID, polarization, grey zone %) respect the preference with fallback. zone_basis field added to all TID and zone distribution blocks.
Per-interval segment data for structured sessions (power, HR, cadence, zone, W'bal, decoupling per rep). has_intervals flag in latest.json. Incremental cache, 7-day retention, sport family whitelist.
— sync.py v3.81 + SECTION_11.md v11.14 — Feel/RPE scope clarification (2026-03-12) —
Readiness signals 7 → 6 (HRV, RHR, Sleep, TSB, ACWR, RI). Feel is retrospective — stays in activity data, history, and report templates. Three-layer Feel/RPE model formalized. Override rules added.
GitHub connector table updated (Grok, ChatGPT Codex, Claude MCP, Gemini Workspace footnotes). Project instructions unified across README + SETUP_ASSISTANT. intervals.json references across 8 docs.
Upgrade: replace your sync.py with the latest from github.com/CrankAddict/section-11/tree/main/examples/sync.py
